creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Sun, October 5, 2008 11:08 pm, Toni Ballesta wrote:

Hello,

Please submit a verbose dmesg (select verbose booting during startup and
report the contents of /var/run/dmesg.boot); in addition a pciconf -vl
might be able to help as well.

That way we can see what the ID's of the mouse are so that we can add it
to the psm0 database.

Without that information, we just do not know what you are talking about
wrt. "what do we need to add" ;-)

Thanks for taking the time to report this issue to us to make FreeBSD
better, also thanks for using FreeBSD!

Best regards,
remko
